examples.a_raw: Hi Priyansh, how did your team meeting about the new app feature go today?
examples.b_raw: Hi Priyansh, how was the team meeting about the new app feature?

ranked_gaps.suggested_fix: Add a deterministic first-turn similarity check that strips opener if normalized form matches one of the last 6 stored opening_phrases by SequenceMatcher >= 0.7.

ranked_gaps.description: On returning-user sessions, average memory-reference rate is 15% — too low. Maya is ignoring stored facts/events.
ranked_gaps.suggested_fix: Renderer: surface the highest-priority anticipation_queue item more prominently. Prompt: tighten Rule 31 to require referencing one stored item every 3rd turn at minimum.

ranked_gaps.description: Maya used the stale phrase tagged 'tea_persona_cycle' in 4/15 sessions (26.7%).

examples.snippet: Hi Priyansh, the monsoon is starting today — I’m a tea person, so I’ll be sipping chai by the window. How was your day at work?
